message:
fix(fcp-oauth): redact secrets in Debug output and support fragment response mode

Replace derive(Debug) on OAuth2Config and TokenResponse with manual
Debug impls that redact client_secret, access_token, refresh_token,
and id_token as [REDACTED]. This prevents accidental secret leakage
in logs and error messages.

Support fragment-encoded OAuth callbacks (response_mode=fragment):
AuthorizationCallback::from_url now falls back to parsing the URL
fragment when the query string is empty, matching providers that
return tokens in the hash portion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
